description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural wood finish. The structure features three open shelves at the top, ideal for displaying or storing items, and a lower section with four horizontal drawers for enclosed storage. The sides are open, supported by vertical wooden slats, giving the piece a modern and airy appearance. The drawers are flush with the frame, lacking visible handles, which enhances its minimalist design. The wood grain is visible throughout, adding warmth and texture to the overall look. This unit would be suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors for both display and storage purposes.
description: A tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and four lower drawers, featuring a minimalist, handle-less design and a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves above four flush drawers, all in a natural wood finish.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and drawers, as well as the open, slatted side supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back panel behind the drawers and open shelves above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the open, slatted support structure and shelf depth.
